title: Yazid b. 'Abd al -Malik's Dismissal of 'Abd al-Rahman b. al-lDahhak from Medina
description: Yazid b. 'Abd al -Malik's Dismissal of 'Abd al-Rahman b. al-lDahhak from Medina. Recorded under the year 104 AH (722–723 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 24.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 24
